texto: The truth reveals itself in the most innocent of ways. You can lie and deceive, attempt to bury that which you wish to remain unseen. Yet the truth flourishes, rising from it's prison to stand tall for all to see.
explicacao: Citação de D. Alma sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The truth reveals itself in the most innocent of ways. You can lie and deceive, attempt to bury t…” articula reflexao, lies, verdade em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como verdade.
